name: massive
description: Massive financial data API plugin. Adds API knowledge, endpoint discovery, project scaffolding, and auto-configured MCP tools for building with Massive's REST and WebSocket APIs across equities, options, crypto, forex, indices, and futures.

interface.shortDescription: Financial data API plugin for equities, options, crypto, forex, indices, and futures.
interface.longDescription: Adds API knowledge, endpoint discovery, project scaffolding, and auto-configured MCP tools for building with Massive's financial data APIs.
